response.original_title: KISMET - A Journey With Adrien Brody
response.overview: Adrien Brody travels through the landscapes and streets of Morocco, reflecting on fate, chance, and the unseen connections that shape our lives. As his journey unfolds alongside Monos' Aluminum Collection, seemingly ordinary encounters reveal the mysterious threads that bind people, places, and destiny together.
response.title: KISMET - A Journey With Adrien Brody
